comments.text:
Feature: System and device controls
  Scenario: Raw command passthrough
    Given a Pixoo at IP "192.168.0.37"
    And I connect
    When I send raw command "Device/SetBrightness" with payload
    Then the last command should be "Device/SetBrightness"
